reviewSummary.summary: The draft contains the core login workflow controls but includes duplicate password representations, unstable autogenerated locators, noisy layout content, and lacks the required authentication failure validation element needed for negative-path automation coverage.

issues.message: Two separate password elements represent the same user-facing password control using different DOM layers, creating ambiguity for downstream resource and keyword generation.
issues.suggested_fix: Retain only the canonical password field using the stable semantic locator 'id=password'.

issues.message: The element name is implementation-oriented and inconsistent with workflow terminology.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename the element to 'username_field' to improve readability and reuse.

issues.message: The element name is overly generic and does not clearly indicate business purpose.
The locator uses autogenerated Ionic id 'ion-input-0', which is likely unstable across sessions or builds.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a semantic locator such as the input placeholder or a stable field identifier.

issues.message: The locator 'id=ion-input-1' appears autogenerated and brittle.
The locator depends on the tokenized visible text '[BTN_LOGIN]', which may be localization-driven or dynamically rendered.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a semantic locator based on the Login button text attribute or another stable button identifier.

issues.message: The background container is decorative layout content and provides no workflow or validation value.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the background container from the approved page model.

issues.message: The workflow explicitly requires validation that all failed authentication attempts display a generic Failed message, but no failure message element exists in the artifact.
issues.suggested_fix: Add an 'authentication_failed_message' element with a reusable validation locator.

approved_elements.name: username_field
approved_elements.description: Field used to enter the username for authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_field
approved_elements.description: Masked field used to enter the account password.

approved_elements.name: login_button
approved_elements.description: Submits the login request for authentication.

approved_elements.name: back_button
approved_elements.description: Returns the user to the previous or home page without authentication.

approved_elements.name: home_button
approved_elements.description: Navigates directly to the home page without authenticating the user.

approved_elements.name: authentication_failed_message
approved_elements.description: Generic authentication failure message shown for invalid, blank, or partial credential submissions.
